name: Honey-Walnut Prawns
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the walnuts and boil them in 5 cups of water, continuously changing the water until it is clear.
2. Boil the walnuts with sugar until the sugar dissolves.
3. Heat 2 cups of oil until almost smoking, then deep-fry the walnuts until they are shiny and brown but no longer golden. Remove the walnuts to a cookie sheet and let them cool.
4. Mix cornstarch and egg whites together to form a thick, sticky texture. Mix well with the prawns.
5. Set aside the prawn mixture.
6. In a medium bowl, mix honey, mayonnaise, lemon juice, and condensed milk until smooth.
7. Heat oil until boiling, then deep-fry the prawns until golden brown.
8. Drain the prawns, fold in the honey-mayonnaise mixture, and mix well. Sprinkle with walnuts and arrange on a platter.
9. Serves 4 to 6.
